case_title: CRISTINA ESTERAS et al VS. OES ( ONE EMBARCADERO SOUTH )

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ESTERAS, CRISTINA LUISE ,AS TRUSTEE OF THE LUCY ESTERAS LIVING TRUST ESTERAS, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT OES ( ONE EMBARCADERO SOUTH ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OES ( ONE EMBARCADERO SOUTH )

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT THIS CASE IS IN THE PROCESS OF BEING SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLIVE LAISIG--COMMUNITY MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/31/13. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

"BY AGREEMENT, THE COMPLAINT IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER PARTY PLAINTIFF AS: CRISTINA LUISE ESTERAS, AS TRUSTEES OF THE LUCY ESTERAS LIVING TRUST", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CLIVE LAING--COMMUNITY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
